features.name: AI Recipe Generation (V1)
features.description: Creative recipe generation using OpenAI GPT models with rich descriptions and emojis for inspiration

features.name: Tech Card V2 Conversion
features.description: Convert creative V1 recipes to structured V2 tech cards with cost calculation, nutrition (KBJU), and IIKO integration

features.name: IIKO RMS Integration
features.description: Full integration with IIKO restaurant management system including product catalog sync, article allocation, and export

features.name: SKU Mapping & Auto-Mapping
features.description: Automatic and manual mapping of ingredients to IIKO product codes with fuzzy matching and fallback generation

features.name: Nutrition Calculator (KBJU)
features.description: Calculate nutritional values (calories, proteins, fats, carbs) per 100g and per portion

features.name: Export System
features.description: Export tech cards in multiple formats: XLSX, CSV, PDF, ZIP archives for IIKO import

features.name: User Authentication & Session Management
features.description: SHA1 hash-based authentication with session tokens and user isolation

features.name: Subscription & Billing
features.description: YooKassa integration for subscription management with PRO features gating

features.name: Feature Flags System
features.description: Controlled rollout of features like HACCP, V2 tech cards, and PRO features

features.name: History & Navigation
features.description: Tech card history management with proper state persistence and navigation

features.name: AI Tools (PRO Features)
features.description: Advanced AI tools like food pairing, inspiration, and creative suggestions

features.name: Database Schema & Migrations
features.description: MongoDB collections for users, tech cards, IIKO sync records with proper indexing

features.name: Error Handling & Validation
features.description: Comprehensive error handling, data validation, and user feedback systems

features.name: Responsive UI Components
features.description: Modern React UI with modals, forms, tables, and interactive elements
